allow: Bash(PYTHONPATH=src uv run --no-project --with pyyaml python -m agentloop.dag:*)
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src uv run --no-project --with pyyaml python -m agentloop.build_loop:*)
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src uv run --no-project --with pyyaml python -m agentloop.issue_sync:*)
Bash(PYTHONPATH=src uv run --no-project --with pyyaml python -m agentloop.revise:*)

hooks.command: test -f .agentloop/state.md && echo '--- AgentLoop current state (top of .agentloop/state.md) ---' && sed -n '1,20p' .agentloop/state.md || true
PYTHONPATH=src uv run --no-project --with pyyaml python -m agentloop.gate_guard
